generated.as: (CASE WHEN deleted_at IS NULL THEN normalized_email ELSE NULL END)

chk_geocoding_subject.name: chk_geocoding_subject
chk_geocoding_subject.value: (`geocoding_results`.`contribution_id` IS NOT NULL) <> (`geocoding_results`.`place_id` IS NOT NULL)

chk_operating_exceptions_mode.name: chk_operating_exceptions_mode
chk_operating_exceptions_mode.value: (`operating_hour_exceptions`.`is_closed` = 1 AND `operating_hour_exceptions`.`opens_at` IS NULL AND `operating_hour_exceptions`.`closes_at` IS NULL) OR (`operating_hour_exceptions`.`is_closed` = 0 AND `operating_hour_exceptions`.`opens_at` IS NOT NULL AND `operating_hour_exceptions`.`closes_at` IS NOT NULL)

chk_operating_hours_mode.name: chk_operating_hours_mode
chk_operating_hours_mode.value: (`operating_hours`.`is_24_hours` = 1 AND `operating_hours`.`opens_at` IS NULL AND `operating_hours`.`closes_at` IS NULL) OR (`operating_hours`.`is_24_hours` = 0 AND `operating_hours`.`opens_at` IS NOT NULL AND `operating_hours`.`closes_at` IS NOT NULL)
